return(function(z,F,l,v,e,O,X,D,u,s,V,q,C,k,J,N,d,p,A,E,Z,r,n)u,D,Z,q,V,J,k,A,C,n,E,p,N,d,r,s=function(z)s[z]=s[z]-(-776888-(-776889))if s[z]==-740708-(-740708)then s[z],D[z]=nil,nil end end,{},function()k=(-775522-(-775523))+k s[k]=204663-204662 return k end,function(z)for o=-365176+365177,#z,-48858-(-48859)do s[z[o]]=s[z[o]]+(-61271+61272)end if l then local N=l(true)local
